title: fix: restore docs regenerate workflow auth
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Polly gets her keys back
gist.blurb: Fixed a permissions hiccup in our automated documentation workflow. The bots can now properly update the API docs again.
gist.summary: Restored the correct GitHub token permissions for the automated API documentation generation workflow.
gist.impact: Internal workflows for regenerating API documentation will now run successfully without authentication errors.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about fixing bot permissions/auth for generating docs. Characters: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot. Metaphor: Giving keys or an access badge to the robot so it can write in a book (docs).
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot handing a glowing golden key to a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head. The robot is holding a large book labeled 'DOCS'. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot handing a glowing golden key to a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head. The robot is holding a large book labeled 'DOCS'.
